justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently and accurately interpreted the user's requested dates and times for appointments throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent repeatedly reported unavailability without offering concrete alternative slots, instead asking the user to propose new times.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation was highly inefficient, with the agent repeatedly checking for unavailable slots and asking the user to suggest new times, leading to 12 turns without a resolution.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively suggest available slots and the repetitive nature of the conversation.

overall_notes: The agent's inability to proactively suggest available times, even when the user expressed increasing frustration and flexibility, made the conversation very inefficient and ultimately unsuccessful.
